business.name: Atlantic HVAC/Duct Cleaning
business.tagline: Gutters that work when Tampa storms hit

hero.headline: Tampa's *go-to* gutter crew since day one
hero.subheadline: Clean, repair, replace — we handle the whole system so water goes where it should.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every part of your gutter system
services_section.subheading: From cleaning out the leaves to full replacements

services.title: Gutter Cleaning
services.description: Clear out debris, check downspouts, test water flow. Your gutters work like new.

services.title: Gutter Repair
services.description: Fix leaks, realign sections, replace damaged brackets. Stop the drip before it becomes a problem.

services.title: Gutter Installation
services.description: New seamless gutters sized right for your roof. Proper slope, secure mounting, guaranteed flow.

services.title: Downspout Service
services.description: Install, repair, or relocate downspouts. Water goes where you want it, not where it lands.

about.heading: Tampa gutters done right
about.body: We're the Tampa crew that shows up when we say we will. One call, one team, one bill.

reviews.name: Bridget M.
reviews.text: We've used Atlantic for multiple jobs and they never disappoint. This time they cleaned our gutters, power washed everything, and sealed our pavers. Amazing work as always.

reviews.name: Christina K.
reviews.text: Atlantic was referred to us and exceeded expectations. Prompt quote, professional crew, efficient work. Chris and his team were courteous throughout.

reviews.name: Caroline B.
reviews.text: Scott and Chris showed up on time and take pride in their work. Fastidious describes how they work - the finished job left everything clean and shining.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Tampa Bay
service_areas.subheading: Professional gutter services throughout the region

cta.heading: Ready to fix those gutters?
cta.body: Free quotes, honest pricing, and work that lasts. Let's get your gutters working right.
